race.comment: GOLDEN GURU (2) returns a gelding for the Gluyas camp. Has found the maiden win elusive but built nicely last campaign without breaking through. Looks to have come on nicely since undergoing the ultimate gear change, stripping fitter for two hitouts. Can make the perfect return. ILUSTRIOUS WARRIOR (4) wasn't far away on debut last start over 1000m at Bendigo, finishing fifth and beaten just over 2L. Improvement to come and will prove tougher to beat with that run under the belt. MALDIVICA (7) turned in a bold run first up when she tried to lead throughout but faded and finished fourth at Morphettville. Strips fitter and should look to burn across from the draw again to give a sight. Chance to steal it this time. QUILLAN (10) wasn't far away on debut last start over 1000m at this track, finishing sixth. Is another likely improver worth including.
